commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4aadbd7d039e81b8c4ecd3b5b3b820f4a6633948)
commands.review_summary:
The branch expands experimental `localModelLean` to remove managed `web_search`/`web_fetch` and suppress provider-native OpenAI/Codex web search unless the run explicitly preserves web tools, with docs and targeted tests updated.

PR surface: Source +153, Tests +202, Docs 0. Total +355 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level behavior being changed: current main shows lean mode only removes `browser`, `cron`, and `message`, while the PR removes web tools too. I did not rerun the linked Windows event-loop starvation scenario.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide the lean-mode compatibility policy, while the author can repair the provider SDK context mismatch before another review.

target.title: fix(agents): trim web tools in lean mode
target.body:
## Summary

- extend `localModelLean` so it trims `web_search` and `web_fetch` along with `browser`, `cron`, and `message`
- keep explicit override behavior for exact, grouped, and wildcard web preserves (`group:web`, `web_*`) while suppressing native OpenAI/Codex web-search injection unless the run preserves web tools
- update local-model docs so the experimental lean-mode contract matches the runtime behavior

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search-core.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts src/plugins/types.ts extensions/openai/native-web-search.ts extensions/openai/shared.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search-core.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts src/plugins/types.ts extensions/openai/native-web-search.ts extensions/openai/shared.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean` now removes managed web search/fetch tools and prevents provider-native OpenAI/Codex `web_search` injection unless web tools are explicitly preserved.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw Codex worktree with symlinked `node_modules`; Crabbox remote proof attempted through provider `azure`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: targeted Vitest for lean filtering, provider-policy integration, Codex native web-search activation, OpenAI wrapper payload behavior, provider stream-family propagation, embedded extra-param wrapper behavior, and bundled OpenAI plugin behavior; docs MDX/list checks; formatter/lint checks; whitespace diff check; autoreview branch review.

Evidence after fix: the expanded targeted Vitest run passed 7 files across 4 shards, 230 tests total. It proves lean mode keeps `read`/`exec`, drops `web_search`/`web_fetch`/`browser`/`cron`/`message`, preserves web tools via `group:web` and `web_*`, and suppresses managed, Codex-native, and direct OpenAI-native web search when lean mode trims web tools.

Observed result after fix: lean-mode docs and runtime now agree that weaker local-model setups get a smaller web/browser/scheduling/message tool surface across managed and native search representations.

What was not tested: remote `pnpm check:changed` did not run. The first attempt failed because Crabbox provider `azure` returned `active lease limit exceeded: 9/8`; the final attempt allocated slug `tidal-shrimp` but timed out waiting 10 minutes for lease `cbx_c95f57c719d0`. `crabbox list --provider azure --target linux` did not show that late lease afterward. `blacksmith testbox list --all` also failed because the local Blacksmith CLI is not authenticated.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
